violations.text: Dishes, utensils, and sanitizer buckets were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Items were removed at the time of inspection. The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Hand washing sinks must be supplied with paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine, and can opener were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of and can opener was moved to 3-bay sink at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use ice machine until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

Various food was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

Hamburgers are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Burgers were marked on menu at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

Chicken was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Chicken was placed under running water to finish thawing at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025
The condensate from the prep unit is draining into a container underneath the unit. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025
The oil disposal area was observed with an accumulation of debris. The oil disposal area must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2025
The hood system was observed with an accumulation of grease build up. Hoods systems must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2025
